title: Yeo (hangul)
summary: Yeo (letter: ㅕ; name: 여) is a diphthong of the Korean hangul alphabet, representing the sound [jʌ] as described by the IPA.
text:
Yeo (letter: ㅕ; name: 여) is a diphthong of the Korean hangul alphabet, representing the sound [jʌ] as described by the IPA.
